emails.subject: Re: Deal 585388
emails.body: Re: Deal 585388 Yes, it should have been Sierra Pacific Power Co. I've changed it in EnPower. These traders' heads are starting to spin with all the variations on counterparty names, as I'm sure yours is as well! Thanks, Kate Rhonda L Denton 04/18/2001 02:25 PM

emails.subject: Deal 585388
emails.body: Deal 585388 One more question, I promise. Bob Badeer did this deal and entered it as Sierra Pacific Industries and I just changed it to Holding Company. Should it have been Sierra Pacific Power Company because the delivery is Palo Verde and the Holding Co. deals are all SP15.

emails.subject: Re: Deal 585388
emails.body: I'm going to take Sierra Pacific Industries, Inc. out of Enpower. Chris assured me he would let everyone know which is which. Spinning heads, huh, I would like to see that!!!! Kate Symes 04/18/2001 04:25 PM
